title: Introduction to Claude Code
description: Get started with Claude Code and learn basic operations.
tip: Run `claude` in your terminal to begin.
content:
Welcome to the Claude Code Advent Calendar! 🎄
This interactive course will guide you through building, deploying, and optimizing applications with Claude.

In this first lesson, we will cover:

  • Installing the CLI
  • Navigating workspace contexts
  • Running search and edit commands

Happy coding!

title: Next.js Routing
description: Learn the ins and outs of the Next.js App Router and dynamic paths.
tip: Always use Server Components by default unless you need client-side interactivity.
content:
Today we're building routes!
Next.js uses a file-system based router where folders define routes.

Example route structure:

ts
src/app/
  page.tsx          // matches /
  lesson/
    [id]/
      page.tsx      // matches /lesson/1, /lesson/2, etc.

Let's explore routing further in the next steps.
